---
title: "Guides"
subtitle: "Topic guides and how-to articles — coming soon."
---

::: {.callout-note title="Coming soon"}
This section will hold longer how-to articles on specific themes — working with
data from commercial software, building and checking a scale, handling missing
values across platforms, and more. They go beyond the [Get Started](index.qmd)
on-ramp and point toward the fuller treatment in the books.
:::

For now, the [Get Started](index.qmd) guide is the place to begin.
